{{Quote|Supreme Commander. A rank second only to warmaster. |[[Tenel Ka Djo]]|<ref name="DW">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Supreme Commander''' was a rank among the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

Supreme Commander was the highest rank after [[Warmaster]], but immediately below it came the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]], which was borne by the [[Captain/Legends|captains]] of most individual ships. It seems therefore to be analogous to the "[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]]" and "[[General/Legends|General]]" ranks of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

Supreme Commanders could serve several roles in the Yuuzhan Vong military: they were often the leaders of battlegroups, but officers of this rank could also have charge of prosecuting the war across a whole region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], or serve as the captains of large [[Warship/Legends|warships]]. For instance, Supreme Commander [[Nas Choka]], leading operations in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], was the senior officer promoted to Warmaster after the death of [[Tsavong Lah]]. After his promotion, another Supreme Commander served as his flagship's captain, with several more acting as his senior aides.

By [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], at least three dozen Supreme Commanders accompanied Warmaster Nas Choka during a sacrifice ritual on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

==Known Supreme Commanders==
*[[Shedao Shai]], [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]
*[[Malik Carr]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Chaan]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Nas Choka]], [[25 ABY/Legends|25]] - [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]; [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[Warmaster]]
*[[Saluup Fing]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Loiric Kaan]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Komm Karsh]], [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]
*[[Zho Krazhmir]], [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]
*[[Laait]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Czulkang Lah]], [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]; out of retirement due to Warmaster [[Tsavong Lah]]'s request
*[[Maal Lah]], [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]
*[[Tivvik]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Sla Tsun]], [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
